name: codex
summary: REVISE: F-001 async pre-start race (busy keyed off thread.is_alive not locked state -> 2nd /invocations gets 2nd 202; ping can read Healthy for accepted run); F-002 grant_put/bucket grant over-broad (s3 LegalHold/Retention/VersionTagging/Abort* + kms:Decrypt beyond upload path). F-003 MINOR cfn-lint repro command mismatch. synth ok, 31 infra tests pass, no src/tests-evals change, sole identity wildcard = ecr:GetAuthorizationToken.

name: test_integrity

name: code
summary: agent-skills:code-reviewer: code/architecture clean (async contract, conditional-report, import safety, IAM, deploy ordering all correct; 31 tests pass; verbatim CHECK fidelity) BUT a hard blocking policy finding: the judged-window commit subjects use 'phase 4 (...)' roadmap-label jargon the user's global CLAUDE.md forbids in commit messages and says reviewers must treat as blocking. Confirms the 88% coverage gap is a legitimate finding (HTTP handler/serve + app.py wiring untested).

name: regression
summary: Phase 4 PRD CHECK verbatim all green: cd infra && cdk synth --all -q exit 0 (3 stacks incl ComplianceRuntimeStack); pytest infra/tests 31 passed (AgentCore Runtime resource present + async contract); README decision+current-docs+Reasoning-Gate + RAG-eval-gate pre-deploy + deploy ordering greps match; cfn-lint region-scoped us-east-1 0 errors (E3006 catalog-lag for GA resource documented); no IAM Resource:* beyond justified (test-enforced). No src/ or tests/evals change.

name: test_engineer
summary: ADVISORY (non-blocking). Both new test files assert REAL, mutation-resistant behavior (non-blocking 202+HealthyBusy, no-grounding=success, failure surfaced, 409, exactly-one-wildcard, differential lifetime, out-of-range ValueError, no-NAT). 3 genuine correctness gaps worth adding: REPORT_BUCKET-unset->failed, S3-upload-raises->failed, direct add_dependency synth test. http.client handler test is optional coverage-cleanup. SSM grep assertion is mutation-soft - tighten.
